title: loud shields
description: Makes shield breaking sounds a bit louder perfect for smps and pvp.
body:
Loud-Shield Resource Pack 
A sound pack that Makes the shield breaking sound a bit louder to give the same vibe as [Shield Status](https://modrinth.com/mod/shield-statuses) While keeping it fair 
![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5042c80e27af58eb88e86b5d31f82b020fc3d694.png)
##### more packs in my profile callmeportal. feel free to check them out!
